vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Structural integrity under wing bending loads
Thermal management for equipment bay door
Human service access for equipment bay door

verify.value: All required fields are present and non-empty.
verify.rule: All required fields must be present and non-empty.
mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces have matching connection_type, dof, clearance_mm, and required_feature in neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must have matching connection_type, dof, clearance_mm, and required_feature in neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: Critical joints state locking method (locknut, insert, washer, adhesive note) and torque/preload intent; bolt patterns match load direction.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of wing spar reinforcement during assembly due to tolerance stack-up.
risk.mit: Implement additional datum features and ensure precise alignment tools are used during assembly.

risk.desc: Cooling inlet may not provide sufficient airflow if the motor pod is not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure the cooling inlet and motor pod are aligned during assembly and verify airflow during testing.

risk.desc: Field service access may be blocked by internal components if not properly planned.
risk.mit: Design service access panels and ensure they are easily accessible during maintenance.

risk.desc: Structural integrity may be compromised if wing spar reinforcement does not meet load requirements.
risk.mit: Conduct structural analysis and testing to ensure the wing spar reinforcement can handle 3g loads.

risk.desc: Thermal management channels may become blocked if not properly designed and maintained.
risk.mit: Design channels with sufficient clearance and ensure regular maintenance to prevent blockages.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod with equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.path_description: Transmits wing bending loads to wing spar for structural integrity
Cooling air flow for motor pod cooling
Thermal management for equipment bay door to maintain internal temperature
Propulsion motion from motor pod to pusher prop
Atmospheric pressure differential for equipment bay door sealing
Human access for equipment bay door maintenance

integration_opportunities.description: Mounting points for various sensors and avionics
Cutouts for easy access to internal components

verification_focus.description: Ensure the wing spar reinforcement can handle 3g loads
Verify the cooling inlet can provide adequate airflow to the motor pod
Ensure the motor pod is securely mounted and can handle 8Nm servo loads

verify.rule: All required features and interfaces are present in the part_tree and geometry_ops.
The mass estimate matches the design brief.
All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in the part_tree and geometry_ops.
Each interface has a reciprocal connection_type and required_feature in the adjacent_interfaces.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of anti-rotation key due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement a more robust alignment mechanism during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion causing stress in the spar.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion joints or flexible materials in the design.

risk.desc: Potential for fastener failure due to incorrect torque application.
risk.mit: Provide detailed torque specifications and training for assembly personnel.

risk.desc: Risk of dust ingress through service access panel.
risk.mit: Design the service access panel with a dust-proof seal.

risk.desc: Potential for load path disruption if ribs are not properly attached.
risk.mit: Ensure ribs are securely fastened and inspected during assembly.

verification_focus.description: Verify load path from spar to fuselage frames
Verify clearances for bolted and snap-fit interfaces

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion to affect fit between wing ribs and spar.
risk.mit: Implement thermal expansion joints and use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Risk of moisture ingress into battery bay due to inadequate sealing.
risk.mit: Specify waterproof seals and gaskets for all openings in the battery bay.

risk.desc: Risk of control surface binding due to insufficient clearance.
risk.mit: Ensure all control surfaces have adequate clearance and lubrication points.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to inadequate spar alignment.
risk.mit: Implement clear alignment features for spar socket and anti-rotation keys.

risk.desc: Risk of payload bay interference with elevon motion.
risk.mit: Optimize elevon hinge design to ensure clearance with payload bay.

risk.desc: Potential thermal hotspots near servo connectors may affect performance.
risk.mit: Implement thermal vias and heat sinks near connector areas.

risk.desc: Strain relief channels may not provide adequate protection at high g-forces.
risk.mit: Increase strain relief geometry and ensure routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Access cover may be difficult to remove in field conditions.
risk.mit: Design access cover with quick-release mechanism.

risk.desc: Control horn mounting may be prone to misalignment.
risk.mit: Include alignment pins and visual indicators.

risk.desc: Servo pockets may not provide sufficient clearance for cable harnesses.
risk.mit: Increase pocket size and ensure routing respects minimum bend radius.

generated_parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
generated_parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

requirements: Design a motor pod for a 2m wingspan UAV with a 10x7 folding propeller, ensuring a thrust line +1deg down.
Integrate the motor pod with the wing structure, propeller, and electrical harness.
Provide cooling air path from wing leading edge to motor.
Ensure the motor pod is compatible with a 2814 BLDC motor and a folding propeller.
Design for agricultural survey and low-altitude dust tolerance.

verify.rule: All required fields and structure are present.
Total mass is within the design envelope.
All P0 internal_feature_targets are represented in geometry_ops.
All interfaces have matching definitions in adjacent subsystems.
All critical joints have visible locking and preload evidence.
Boundary conditions are defined for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential for dust accumulation in cooling channels.
risk.mit: Design cooling channels with sufficient slope and airspeed to prevent dust accumulation.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow due to wing design.
risk.mit: Verify cooling airflow through CFD analysis and adjust wing design if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of fastener loosening due to vibration.
risk.mit: Use locking nuts and vibration-resistant adhesives on all critical fasteners.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to overloading.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and ensure all structural components meet safety factors.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference from harness routing.
risk.mit: Route harness away from high-frequency components and use shielded cables.
